mapper.select: SELECT BNNR_COM_CD_ID , BNNR_SQN , BNNR_PHRS_CON , BNNR_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , BNNR_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID , BTN_PHRS_CON , BNNR_LNKN_URL , EXPU_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_BNNR_INFO_M WHERE 1=1 AND BNNR_COM_CD_ID = #{bnnrComCdId} AND BNNR_SQN = #{bnnrSqn}
